user.title: AirTagSync — connect to your Mac
user.description:
AirTagSync reads the FindMy cache from your Mac over SSH and creates AirTag device trackers in Home Assistant.

Before you continue, make sure:
• Remote Login is enabled on the Mac (System Settings → General → Sharing → Remote Login)
• You've added the integration's public SSH key to the Mac's `~/.ssh/authorized_keys`
• You've extracted `FMIPDataManager.bplist` from the Mac and have it ready to paste

See the README for the full extractor walkthrough.

error.ssh_auth_failed: SSH auth refused — the private key isn't accepted by the Mac. Make sure the matching public key is in `~/.ssh/authorized_keys`.
error.ssh_connect_failed: Couldn't reach the Mac on SSH. Check host/IP, port, and that Remote Login is enabled.
error.invalid_fmip_key: Couldn't parse the FMIP key. Paste either the entire `FMIPDataManager.bplist` (base64) or the raw 32-byte symmetric key (base64).
error.decrypt_failed: Found the file but couldn't decrypt it with that key. Likely wrong FMIP key — re-run the extractor.
